# nxos_ttag (Data Source)

This data source can read the PTP ttag configuration on NX-OS devices, including per-interface ttag settings for underlay and overlay traffic.

### API Documentation

- [ttagTtagEntity](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Interfaces/ttag:TtagEntity/)
- [ttagTtagIf](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Interfaces/ttag:TtagIf/)

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nxos_ttag" "example" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The distinguished name of the object.
- `ttag_interfaces` (Attributes Map) Per-interface PTP ttag configuration and management.
  - Map key: `interface_id` - Interface id of port with PTP configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ttag_interfaces))
- `ttag_marker_interval` (Number) PTP ttag marker interval in seconds.

<a id="nestedatt--ttag_interfaces"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ttag_interfaces`

Read-Only:

- `ttag` (Boolean) TTAG header for underlay traffic (outer) on interface.
- `ttag_inner` (Boolean) TTAG header for overlay traffic (inner) on interface.
- `ttag_marker` (Boolean) Ttag marker packet on interface.
- `ttag_strip` (Boolean) Strip ttag from egress packet on this interface.
